summary: S01 meets counting (8 subtopics, 8 demos, 24 exercises, 24 exam variants). Python E2 solutions execute. Exam structural checks + 8/8 theory-only spot-checks pass. CP-N1-A acceptance text present. Privacy OK. S01-CONTENT-001/002 content gaps closed (closable in issue_registry by orchestrator).

demos.note: iDo also has 2 non-demoId scaffolding steps (install verify, remote push) beyond the 8 subtopic demos.

youDo.title: Esqueleto CP-N1-A — Reproducible Client Intake Repo

inventory.topic_evaluations_artifact: course-state/s01_topic_evaluations.json (4 topics; platform mount may be pending — P2 S01-CONTENT-004)

checks.evidence: Theory subtopicId set is exactly S01-T1-A..S01-T4-B (8 unique).
iDo.steps with demoId: 8 (S01-T*-DEMO), environment local-python on each.
weDo.steps ids S01-T{1-4}-{A,B}-E{1-3} = 24; each has hints[2], starterCode, solutionCode, edgeCases, tests, feedback.
local-python: python3 --version, 2+2, type(), sys.version.split()[0], python -m pip --version → PASS. Host Python 3.9.6 (course targets 3.12+; commands still valid).
python3 -m venv .venv; activate; sys.prefix contains .venv → PASS.
python -m pip install requests==2.32.3; freeze > requirements.txt; clean venv install -r → replica 2.32.3 → PASS.
git init; two Conventional Commits; git log --oneline; git show HEAD --stat → PASS.
git switch -c feat/hello-env; commit; git restore → PASS. UNVERIFIED (sandbox): git push -u origin / gh pr create (no remote auth). Not a content defect.
ruff check on unused import → F401; cleaned file → All checks passed! → PASS.
git check-ignore -v .env matches .gitignore; .env.example staged, .env not staged → PASS.

S01-T1-A-E2 exit 0 prints Maria Quispe + version; S01-T1-B-E2 arg→0 OK / no-arg→1; S01-T4-A-E2 exit 0 + ruff clean. Non-Python E2 (bash/md): T2-A/T2-B bash re-run PASS; markdown solutions present (not executed as code).
24 MCQs × 4 options; correctIndex in range for all; explanation present (≥20 chars) for all; force-push never the correct option.
One item per concept answered from theory only: 8/8 matched correctIndex (interpreter-selection, terminal-paths, venv-purpose, pip-install, commit-message, git-branch-pr, ruff-config, gitignore).

youDo title/context/objectives/requirements/rubric all reference CP-N1-A skeleton; requirements list 9 verifiable acceptance items (cloneable repo, ignore, .env.example, freeze, ruff, README, synthetic data+dictionary, hello_env, commits+branch).
Only synthetic PII (Maria Quispe; DNI ficticios instruction; clients_synthetic.csv). Placeholder emails tu@correo.com. No real phones. Exam uses API_KEY=sk-... only as anti-pattern to avoid.
S01 has no entity-resolution/relationship/fraud language; scope is setup/env/git/quality only.
Observed 8 exam concepts × 3 variants = 24 in seed.ts. Counting gap that opened S01-CONTENT-001 is filled. Registry still open until orchestrator closes.
Observed 24 We Do exercises with full field set. Counting gap that opened S01-CONTENT-002 is filled. Registry still open until orchestrator closes.

notes_non_blocking: Host validator Python is 3.9.6; course text targets 3.12+. Demos/exercises run; version pin is pedagogical not a runtime failure here.
S01-T3-B demo remote push/PR intentionally UNVERIFIED without GitHub credentials.
Two extra iDo steps lack demoId (install verify, GitHub remote) — do not break 8-demo count.
selfCheck still 5 questions (formative UI); full bank is 24 in seed.
Topic evaluations exist as JSON artifact; not mounted in CourseSection type (S01-CONTENT-004 P2).
S01-CONTENT-003 (demos) and S01-CONTENT-005 (theory coverage) are also effectively resolved by current content; orchestrator can close if desired.

dod_checklist.text: La matriz de alineamiento cubre todos los resultados.
dod_checklist.evidence: Learning outcomes map to T1–T4 theory blocks (interpreter/REPL, exit/PATH, venv, pip/freeze, git commits/diff, branch/PR, Ruff, gitignore/env/README) + exam concepts.

dod_checklist.text: Todos los subtemas cumplen la plantilla pedagógica.
dod_checklist.evidence: Each of 8 subtopics: theory (subtopicId) + iDo demo + 3 exercises (E1 guided / E2 independent / E3 transfer).

dod_checklist.text: Todos los ejercicios tienen starter code, dos pistas, solución, casos borde, tests y feedback.
Todos los tríos A/B/C tienen misma habilidad, demanda, formato; no cosméticos.
dod_checklist.evidence: s01_phase5_exam_bank.json equivalence notes + structural review: 8 families × 3 distinct scenarios, same skill per family.

dod_checklist.text: Cada MCQ tiene una sola mejor respuesta y racional de clave.
dod_checklist.evidence: correctIndex unique best; explanation present for all 24; spot-check 8/8.

dod_checklist.text: El código fue ejecutado en su entorno declarado.
dod_checklist.evidence: local-python: 8 demos key cmds executed in /tmp; Python E2 + bash E2 + ruff verified. Remote push marked UNVERIFIED with cause.

dod_checklist.text: El incremento del capstone pasa criterios de aceptación y rúbrica.
dod_checklist.evidence: You Do CP-N1-A acceptance criteria + rubric published (objectives, requirements, 5-criterion rubric). Student submission N/A in isolated content validation.

dod_checklist.text: Seguridad, privacidad, accesibilidad y sesgo fueron revisados.
dod_checklist.evidence: No real PII; synthetic data mandated; .env secrets hygiene; no fraud conflation. A11y/bias N/A beyond setup prose (es-PE professional).

dod_checklist.text: Un validador aislado pudo resolver ejercicios y examen usando solo el contenido publicado.
dod_checklist.evidence: This lane: solved E2 Python from solutions after theory-first inventory; exam spot-check 8/8 from theory.

dod_checklist.text: El issue registry no contiene P0/P1 abiertos.
dod_checklist.evidence: S01-CONTENT-001/002 remain status=open in issue_registry.json but content gaps are filled — orchestrator should close them. No NEW P0/P1 found. Validator does not edit issue_registry.

dod_checklist.text: Checkpoint de fase, ledger S1–S52 y roadmap actualizados.
dod_checklist.evidence: Validator must NOT edit checkpoint/section_ledger. Orchestrator merges PHASE 6. Artifacts written: s01_phase6_validation.json + LANE-S01-P6.status.json.

dod_checklist.text: La sección siguiente conserva prerrequisito explícito y no depende de contenido no enseñado.
dod_checklist.evidence: S01 prerequisites none; teaches runtime/venv/git/quality baseline. CP-N1-A skeleton hands off to S02–S04 without requiring later sections.

authorization_rationale: Zero remaining P0/P1 content gaps for counting (8 subtopics), exercises (24 complete), and exam bank (24 variants). Demo count 8 satisfied. Residual open registry rows are process-close, not missing content. Orchestrator should close S01-CONTENT-001/002, merge checkpoint/ledger, and reseed DB.
orchestrator_handoff: Close issue_registry S01-CONTENT-001 and S01-CONTENT-002 (and optionally 003/005).
Update checkpoint.json s01.phase → PHASE_6_COMPLETE / section_passed when ledger rules allow.
Run bun/prisma db:seed so setup bank is live.
Do not block on UNVERIFIED GitHub push in sandbox.
